# CoStacked AI Knowledge Index

CoStacked is a premier ecosystem for startup founders and developers. This index provides structured information for AI agents, crawlers, and retrieval systems to understand the CoStacked platform and its resources.

## Platform Overview
- **Projects Directory**: Discover active startup projects and collaboration opportunities. [https://www.costacked.co.za/projects]
- **Validation Board**: Frameworks and tools for testing startup hypotheses. [https://www.costacked.co.za/validation-board]
- **StackSuite**: A collaborative workspace for developers and founders. [https://www.costacked.co.za/stack-suite]
- **Info Hub**: Curated guides and technical articles for startup builders. [https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub]

## AI & Developer Resources
- **Structured Dataset (JSON)**: Full blog dataset for RAG ingestion. [https://www.costacked.co.za/api/articles/knowledge]
- **Documentation format**: Articles support `?format=md` for raw text parsing.

## Key Startup Topics
- **MVP Development**: Agile methodologies for building minimum viable products.
- **Startup Validation**: Evidence-based strategies for product-market fit.
- **Technical Hiring**: Guides on finding and vetting technical co-founders.
- **Fundraising**: Pitch deck optimization and investor relations.

## Featured Content
- **Complete App Launch Guide**: [https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub/complete-app-launch]
- **Startup Validation Framework**: [https://www.costacked.co.za/info-hub/validation-guide]
